user.title: Wake Planner setup
user.description: Pick the calendars Wake Planner should read (both optional — you can add them later in Settings). People and rules are managed in the Wake Planner sidebar panel after setup.

data.calendar_entity_id: Wake calendar (events like 'wake: 06:30' override that day)

special_rules.title: Weekends & holidays
special_rules.description: How weekends, holidays and manually entered dates affect the wake plan. Manual dates: YYYY-MM-DD, MM-DD (yearly), ranges like YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD, comma separated.

skip_next.name: Skip next wake
skip_next.description: Skip the next wake for a person.

set_override.name: Set override
set_override.description: Set a manual wake time override.

clear_override.name: Clear override
clear_override.description: Clear manual override and skip state.

add_person.name: Add person
add_person.description: Create a new Wake Planner person with a default Mon–Fri 07:00 rule.

entry_id.name: Config entry id (only needed with multiple Wake Planner entries)

remove_person.name: Remove person
remove_person.description: Delete a Wake Planner person and all their rules.

set_rules.name: Set rules
set_rules.description: Replace a person's full rule list. Each rule is a dict (id, name, priority, enabled, weekdays, action, wake_time, optional date_range / week_interval+week_anchor / specific_dates / cycle_*).

set_special_rules.name: Set special rules
set_special_rules.description: Update holiday behaviour and manual holiday dates.
